name: Only Dodge!
short_description: "Only Dodge!" is a game inspired by The World's Hardest Game. The player remotely controls the main character with the goal of helping them escape. Players must avoid blue spheres, touch all yellow objects within each stage, and reach the green area to clear the stage.
detailed_description: "Only Dodge!" is a third-person real-time exploration action game inspired by "The World's Hardest Game". The objective is to avoid blue spheres, touch all yellow objects, and reach the green area to clear each stage. The game consists of a variety of stages where players must skillfully use special abilities to progress. With increasing difficulty across multiple levels, the game continuously challenges players' skills as they advance.
about_the_game: "Only Dodge!" is a third-person real-time exploration action game inspired by "The World's Hardest Game".
